title: centaurea urvillei subsp. hayekiana
intro: Centaurea urvillei subsp. hayekiana, also known as the Centaurea hayekiana, is a subspecies of the Centaurea urvillei plant, which is a type of flowering plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea, and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea urvillei subsp. hayekiana include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
